description_long: This bungalow features a simple rectangular structure with light tan brick exterior walls and a flat, white roof. The front facade includes a central arched doorway with a white door that is partially open, flanked by two rectangular windows, each with white frames and open sashes. The side and rear walls are unadorned, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing a minimalist design. The windows and door frames are made of a contrasting white material, likely painted wood or metal, providing a clean, modern look. The interior is partially visible through the open door and windows, revealing a dark space with hints of reddish flooring. The overall appearance is functional and modern, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with tan brick walls, a central arched doorway, and two front-facing white-framed windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched doorway with an open white door and two open, white-framed windows on either side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain tan brick wall with the edge of the open door and window just visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely unadorned tan brick wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain tan brick wall and the edge of the open door and window barely visible.
